member.name: T:Telegrator.Hosting.Components.IPreBuildingRoutine
member.summary: Interface for pre-building routines that can be executed during host construction. Allows for custom initialization and configuration steps before the bot host is built.

member.name: M:Telegrator.Hosting.Components.IPreBuildingRoutine.PreBuildingRoutine(Telegrator.Hosting.Components.ITelegramBotHostBuilder)
member.summary: Executes the pre-building routine on the specified host builder.

member.name: T:Telegrator.Hosting.Components.ITelegramBotHost
member.summary: Interface for Telegram bot hosts. Combines host application capabilities with reactive Telegram bot functionality.

member.name: T:Telegrator.Hosting.Components.ITelegramBotHostBuilder
member.summary: Interface for building Telegram bot hosts with dependency injection support. Combines host application building capabilities with handler collection functionality.

member.name: P:Telegrator.Hosting.Components.ITelegramBotHostBuilder.Configuration
member.summary: Gets the set of key/value configuration properties.

member.name: P:Telegrator.Hosting.Components.ITelegramBotHostBuilder.Logging
member.summary: Gets a collection of logging providers for the application to compose. This is useful for adding new logging providers.

member.name: P:Telegrator.Hosting.Components.ITelegramBotHostBuilder.Services
member.summary: Gets a collection of services for the application to compose. This is useful for adding user provided or framework provided services.

member.name: T:Telegrator.Hosting.Configuration.ConfigureOptionsProxy`1
member.summary: Abstract base class for configuring options from configuration sources. Provides a proxy pattern for binding configuration to strongly-typed options classes.
member.typeparam: The type of options to configure.

member.name: M:Telegrator.Hosting.Configuration.ConfigureOptionsProxy`1.Configure(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Configures the options using the default configuration section.

member.name: M:Telegrator.Hosting.Configuration.ConfigureOptionsProxy`1.Configure(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.String,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Configures the options using a named configuration section.
member.param: The name of the configuration section.

member.name: M:Telegrator.Hosting.Configuration.ConfigureOptionsProxy`1.Configure(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.String,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,System.Action{Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.BinderOptions})
member.summary: Configures the options using a named configuration section with custom binder options.
member.param: The name of the configuration section.
Optional action to configure the binder options.

member.name: M:Telegrator.Hosting.Configuration.ConfigureOptionsProxy`1.Realize
member.summary: Creates the actual options instance from the configuration.

member.name: T:Telegrator.Hosting.Configuration.TelegramBotClientOptionsProxy
member.summary: Internal proxy class for configuring Telegram bot client options from configuration. Extends ConfigureOptionsProxy to provide specific configuration for Telegram bot client options.

member.name: P:Telegrator.Hosting.Configuration.TelegramBotClientOptionsProxy.Token
member.summary: Gets or sets the bot token.

member.name: P:Telegrator.Hosting.Configuration.TelegramBotClientOptionsProxy.BaseUrl
member.summary: Gets or sets the base URL for the bot API.

member.name: P:Telegrator.Hosting.Configuration.TelegramBotClientOptionsProxy.UseTestEnvironment
member.summary: Gets or sets whether to use the test environment.

member.name: P:Telegrator.Hosting.Configuration.TelegramBotClientOptionsProxy.RetryThreshold
member.summary: Gets or sets the retry threshold in seconds.

member.name: P:Telegrator.Hosting.Configuration.TelegramBotClientOptionsProxy.RetryCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of retry attempts.

member.name: M:Telegrator.Hosting.Configuration.TelegramBotClientOptionsProxy.Realize
member.summary: Creates a TelegramBotClientOptions instance from the proxy configuration.

member.name: T:Telegrator.Hosting.HostedTelegramBotInfo
member.summary: Implementation of that provides bot information. Contains metadata about the Telegram bot including user details and service provider for wider filterring abilities

member.name: M:Telegrator.Hosting.HostedTelegramBotInfo.#ctor(Telegram.Bot.ITelegramBotClient,System.IServiceProvider,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfigurationManager)
member.summary: Implementation of that provides bot information. Contains metadata about the Telegram bot including user details and service provider for wider filterring abilities

member.name: P:Telegrator.Hosting.HostedTelegramBotInfo.Services
member.summary: Provides access to services of this Hosted telegram bot

member.name: P:Telegrator.Hosting.HostedTelegramBotInfo.Configuration
member.summary: Provides access to configuration of this Hosted telegram bot

member.name: T:Telegrator.Hosting.Logging.MicrosoftLoggingAdapter
member.summary: Adapter for Microsoft.Extensions.Logging to work with Telegrator logging system. This allows seamless integration with ASP.NET Core logging infrastructure.

member.name: M:Telegrator.Hosting.Logging.MicrosoftLoggingAdapter.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of MicrosoftLoggingAdapter.

member.summary: Service for receiving updates for Hosted telegram bots
Service for receiving updates for Hosted telegram bots

member.summary: Default exception handler of this router

member.name: T:Telegrator.Hosting.Providers.Components.IHostHandlersCollection
member.summary: Collection class for managing handler descriptors organized by update type for host apps. Provides functionality for collecting, adding, scanning, and organizing handlers.

member.summary: List of tasks that should be completed right before building the bot

member.summary: Pre host building task

member.summary: List of tasks that should be completed right before building the bot

member.summary: Provides useful methods to adjust

member.name: M:Telegrator.Hosting.TelegramBotHostExtensions.UseTelegrator(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHost)
member.summary: Replaces the initialization logic from TelegramBotWebHost constructor. Initializes the bot and logs handlers on application startup.

member.summary: Configures bots available commands depending on what handlers was registered

member.name: T:Telegrator.Hosting.ReflectionExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for reflection and type inspection.

member.name: M:Telegrator.Hosting.ReflectionExtensions.IsPreBuildingRoutine(System.Type,System.Reflection.MethodInfo@)
member.summary: Checks if a type implements the interface.
member.returns: True if the type implements IPreBuildingRoutine; otherwise, false.
